context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements range partitioning on orders by created_at with quarterly partitions, automates partition management with a stored procedure, adds correct indexes on the partitioned table, creates a materialized view for aggregations, and uses EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) for validation.

checklist.name: PARTITION BY RANGE on created_at
checklist.description: The orders table is defined with PARTITION BY RANGE (created_at) — not by any other column or method

checklist.name: Four quarterly partitions
checklist.description: At least four quarterly partition tables are created (e.g. orders_2025_q1 through orders_2025_q4 or equivalent year), each with non-overlapping FROM/TO date ranges

checklist.name: Quarterly stored procedure
checklist.description: A stored procedure or function exists that accepts year and quarter parameters and creates the corresponding partition using dynamic SQL (EXECUTE format(...))

checklist.name: Partition key in WHERE clause
checklist.description: The design_notes.md mentions that queries must include a WHERE condition on created_at (the partition key) for partition pruning to work

checklist.name: customer_id index on orders
checklist.description: An index is created on orders(customer_id, created_at DESC) or orders(customer_id) on the parent partitioned table

checklist.name: status index on orders
checklist.description: An index is created on orders(status, created_at DESC) or orders(status) on the parent partitioned table

checklist.name: Materialized view for aggregations
checklist.description: A materialized view is created that aggregates sales data (revenue, order count, or units) grouped by date/time and category

checklist.name: Unique index on materialized view
checklist.description: A UNIQUE index is created on the materialized view (required for CONCURRENTLY refresh) covering at minimum the date and category_id columns

checklist.name: REFRESH CONCURRENTLY
checklist.description: The materialized view refresh uses REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW CONCURRENTLY (not a plain REFRESH without CONCURRENTLY)

checklist.name: EXPLAIN ANALYZE BUFFERS syntax
checklist.description: The design_notes.md shows or references EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, BUFFERS) — not just EXPLAIN alone — for validating index usage after migration

checklist.name: Nightly cron for refresh
checklist.description: design_notes.md recommends scheduling the materialized view refresh as a nightly (or similar periodic) cron job rather than an ad-hoc manual step

checklist.name: CONCURRENTLY index creation
checklist.description: Any new indexes created in the migration script use CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY to avoid write locks
